categories.title: Font downloads
categories.description: Install Chữ Nôm-capable fonts before reading older texts, rare characters, and CJK Extension glyphs.

items.title: Chunom.org Fonts for Chữ Nôm
items.description: A curated list of free CJKV fonts with Chữ Nôm coverage, including guidance on combining fonts for broader character support.

items.title: Noto CJK Fonts
items.description: Official Noto Sans CJK and Noto Serif CJK releases. Useful as modern fallback fonts for broad CJK coverage.

items.title: VietUnicode Hán-Nôm Fonts
items.description: Download page for the Han Nom A and Han Nom B font set, a longstanding option for Hán-Nôm text display.

categories.title: Dictionaries
categories.description: Lookup tools for checking readings, variants, and historical attestations.

items.title: Nôm Foundation Lookup Tool
items.description: A practical starting point for looking up Chữ Nôm characters and readings.

items.title: Tự Điển Chữ Nôm Dẫn Giải
items.description: An online dictionary interface for Chữ Nôm learners and researchers.

categories.title: Digital archives
categories.description: Collections that help learners see Chữ Nôm in manuscripts, printed books, and scholarly contexts.

items.title: Nôm Foundation Digital Library
items.description: A gateway to digitized Hán-Nôm materials and preservation work.

items.title: Columbia Hán-Nôm Special Collection
items.description: A research library collection focused on Vietnamese Hán-Nôm texts.

categories.title: Learning guides
categories.description: Background reading for understanding the writing system and building study habits.

items.title: Omniglot: Chữ Nôm
items.description: A concise overview of the script with examples and external references.

items.title: About Chữ Nôm
items.description: A beginner-friendly internal overview of the script, its background, and why it matters.
